description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, exporters, processors, aggregators, input dealers, and agribusiness documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Plants and Fertilizer Act, 2010 (Act 803) / PPRSD mandate
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Ministry of Food and Agriculture PPRSD

primary_sources.name: Food and Drugs Authority mandate under Public Health Act, 2012 (Act 851)
Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Companies Act, 2019 (Act 992)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Office of the Registrar of Companies

rules.title: Phytosanitary, plant protection, or import/export permit evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for PPRSD, phytosanitary certificate, plant quarantine, import permit, export certificate, SPS, or pest-control evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Plants and Fertilizer Act, 2010 (Act 803) / PPRSD mandate

rules.title: Food safety or FDA regulated-product evidence is present where agricultural products enter food chains
rules.summary: Checks for food safety, FDA registration, product approval, food hygiene, or food standard evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Traceability, batch, or origin evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for farm-origin, batch, lot, supplier, traceability, or quality-assurance records.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Farmer, worker, supplier, or customer personal-data handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy and personal-data handling evidence in agribusiness documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
